ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: di Gregorio Belsensi. All`altezza Serenissima del Principe di Modana, con una lettera responsiva in materia della compositione di questa Tragedia
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The letter is signed with the anagram. Calore, `La biblioteca drammatica`, p. 70 suggest that the tragedy was read in the Accademia dei Gelati, but not performed. Here, the titlepage and the frontispiece are displayed.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: V. D. Inventius Tortus Rector Poenitent. pro Illustrissimo, ac Reverendiss. D. D. Archiepisc. Bonon. & Princip. V. Alexander Simoneta Soc. Iesu, pro Reverendiss. P. Inquisit. IMPRIMATUR F. Gulielmus Inquisit. Bonon.

Essay.EssayTitle: Lettera dell`autore responsiva al sig. Co. Andrea Barbazzi Senatore di Bologna

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
